paired_evidence.upstream_but_for: original and repaired_injection succeed; single_upstream_injection fails under matching shape/form and replay-equivalent pre-state
paired_evidence.dual_cause: dual_fault retains both independently outcome-changing loci
paired_evidence.collateral_control: all valid repaired_injection forms preserve the declared unaffected control

claim_authority.first_observed_divergence: supported only with replay-equivalent pre-state and measured event comparison
claim_authority.but_for_effect_under_replay: supported only for complete valid matched cells
claim_authority.earliest_sufficient_cause: unsupported: synthetic matrix does not exclude all earlier or latent causes
claim_authority.repair_utility: supported only as local synthetic paired recovery without collateral regression
